Get involved

Partners

Shape the first year.

Partnership is not a logo placement: it is a chance to help form a citywide platform for talent, innovation and public engagement.

Ways to work with us

Support the Week as an anchor sponsor, event sponsor, venue partner or knowledge partner. We will build a conversation around the people you want to reach and the impact you want to make.

Partner with the Week

Put your organisation at the centre of Leicester’s space story.

Anchor and event-level sponsorship, venue partnerships and knowledge-partner roles are open for the first year. Early partners shape the programme, not just the logo wall.

Discuss sponsorship
Anchor sponsorHeadline
Event sponsorPer event
Venue partnerIn-kind
Knowledge partnerInstitutional
LEICESTER SPACE WEEKExploring innovation together

A citywide platform for space innovation, sustainability, skills and public engagement—built with Leicester’s research, industry and civic partners.
